channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CONCOR] CONCOR Reports 5.98% Increase in Total Physical Volumes Handled in Q1 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Container Corporation of India Ltd (CONCOR) has released its provisional physical volume data for the quarter ended March 2026 (QE Mar-26). The total physical volumes handled showed a 5.98% increase compared to the same quarter of the previous year. The EXIM segment handled 42,077 TEUs, a 2.22% increase, while the DOM segment handled 1,459,438 TEUs, a 14.59% increase. The total physical volumes handled for the period ended March 2026 (PE Mar-26) were 50,94,942 TEUs, a 9.56% increase from the previous year.

  • CONCOR reports a 5.98% increase in total physical volumes handled in Q1 2026
  • EXIM segment handles 42,077 TEUs, a 2.22% increase
  • DOM segment handles 1,459,438 TEUs, a 14.59% increase
  • Total physical volumes for PE Mar-26 are 50,94,942 TEUs, a 9.56% increase

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CONTAINER CORPORATION OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [ASHIANA] Ashiana Housing Acquires 28.55 Acres in Pune for INR 1,800 Crores Senior Living Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ashiana Housing Ltd. has acquired a 28.55-acre plot in Pune, Maharashtra, for a Senior Living project. This is the company's largest ever land deal, with an approximate saleable area of 20 lakhs sq. ft. and a potential sales value of INR 1,800 crores. The acquisition was made on an outright purchase basis.

  • Ashiana Housing acquires 28.55 acres in Pune for a Senior Living project.
  • This is the company's largest ever land deal.
  • The project has an approximate saleable area of 20 lakhs sq. ft.
  • The potential sales value of the project is INR 1,800 crores.
  • The land was acquired on an outright purchase basis.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASHIANA HOUSING LTD.-$ | Category: New Launch

item.title: [INDRANIB] Indrayani Biotech Clarifies Price Movement Due to Upcoming Rights Issue Committee Meeting and Potential Demerger
item.description:
Indrayani Biotech Ltd has provided a clarification regarding the recent price movement of its shares. The company attributes the movement to the market's reaction to two recent statutory intimations. The first is about the meeting of the Rights Issue (RI) Committee to discuss the ongoing Rights Issue process. The second is about an upcoming Board Meeting to discuss a potential demerger of the company’s food business into a separate company. The company assures that there is no undisclosed information or impending announcement that could affect the price or volume behavior of the scrip.

  • Indrayani Biotech clarifies price movement of its shares
  • Price movement attributed to market's reaction to two recent statutory intimations
  • Rights Issue Committee meeting to discuss ongoing Rights Issue process
  • Upcoming Board Meeting to discuss potential demerger of food business
  • No undisclosed information or impending announcement

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDRAYANI BIOTECH LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [IISL] Ishaan Infrastructures and Shelters Ltd: Appointment of Ms. Megha Sharan and Resignation of Mr. Arvind Kumar Bhandari
item.description:
Ishaan Infrastructures and Shelters Ltd has announced the appointment of Ms. Megha Sharan as a Non-Executive Independent Director (Additional Director) and the resignation of Mr. Arvind Kumar Bhandari from the post of Non-Executive Independent Director due to pre-occupation and personal reasons. The changes are in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Appointment of Ms. Megha Sharan as a Non-Executive Independent Director (Additional Director) of Ishaan Infrastructures and Shelters Ltd.
  • Resignation of Mr. Arvind Kumar Bhandari from the post of Non-Executive Independent Director due to pre-occupation and personal reasons.
  • Ms. Megha Sharan has a strong regulatory track record with no disqualification under Section 164(2) of the Companies Act.
  • Mr. Arvind Kumar Bhandari is not debarred from holding the office of Director by any SEBI order or any other such authority.
  • The changes are in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ishaan Infrastructures and Shelters Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LAL] Lorenzini Apparels Ltd Confirms No Other Material Reasons for Resignation of Independent Directors
item.description:
Lorenzini Apparels Ltd has confirmed that there are no other material reasons for the resignation of its Independent Directors, Mr. Yogesh Kumar and Mr. Ajay, apart from those mentioned in their respective resignation letters. The declarations from the Independent Directors are enclosed for reference and record. The disclosure was made by Sandeep Jain, Managing Director & Chief Financial Officer of the company.

  • Lorenzini Apparels Ltd confirms no other material reasons for the resignation of its Independent Directors
  • The resignation of Mr. Yogesh Kumar and Mr. Ajay, Independent Directors, is not due to any other material reasons
  • The declarations from the Independent Directors are enclosed for reference and record
  • The disclosure was made by Sandeep Jain, Managing Director & Chief Financial Officer of the company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lorenzini Apparels Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NOIDATOLL] Noida Toll Bridge Company Ltd Board Meeting on April 13, 2026, to Discuss Road Maintenance and Other Business Matters
item.description:
Noida Toll Bridge Company Ltd has informed the BSE that a Board Meeting is scheduled on April 13, 2026. The meeting will inter alia consider and approve updates on Road Maintenance work and future requirements, and discuss other business matters. This is in accordance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Noida Toll Bridge Company Ltd Board Meeting scheduled on April 13, 2026
  • Meeting to discuss Road Maintenance work and future requirements
  • Other business matters to be discussed in the meeting

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NOIDA TOLL BRIDGE COMPANY LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HFIL] Himalaya Food International Ltd Announces Resignation of Statutory Auditor M/s Garg Bros & Associates
item.description:
Himalaya Food International Ltd has announced the resignation of its Statutory Auditor, M/s Garg Bros & Associates, Chartered Accountant (FRN: 01005N), as per the Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The decision was made during the Board of Directors meeting held on Tuesday, April 07th, 2026.

  • Himalaya Food International Ltd has announced the resignation of its Statutory Auditor, M/s Garg Bros & Associates, Chartered Accountant (FRN: 01005N).
  • The resignation was made in accordance with the Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The decision was made during the Board of Directors meeting held on Tuesday, April 07th, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Himalaya Food International Ltd | Category: Auditor Resignation

item.title: [MMWL] Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd. to Approve Audited Financial Results on April 15, 2026
item.description:
Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 15, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the 4th Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026, both on Standalone and Consolidated basis. The company also announced that the trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company for all the Designated Persons including their immediate relatives and other Insiders, had already been closed w.e.f. March 31, 2026, and the same shall re-open on April 20, 2026.

  • Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd. to consider and approve Audited Financial Results on April 15, 2026
  • Trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company closed for Designated Persons from March 31, 2026, to April 19, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MEDIA MATRIX WORLDWIDE LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KAJARIACER] Kajaria Ceramics Ltd Clarifies on Recent Volume Surge with No Price Sensitive Information
item.description:
Kajaria Ceramics Ltd has clarified on the significant increase in the volume of its security across exchanges in the recent past. The company stated that as of now, there are no events or information that have a bearing on its operation or performance, including all price sensitive information as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Therefore, they are unable to comment on the surge in volume. The company assures that the increase is market-driven and they do not have any information that can relate to the surge.

  • Kajaria Ceramics Ltd clarifies on recent volume surge
  • No price sensitive information disclosed
  • Increase in volume is market-driven
  • Company does not have information relating to the surge

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KAJARIA CERAMICS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [LTIM] LTIMindtree Spain, S.L. Dissolved and Liquidated: SEBI Regulations Complied
item.description:
LTIMindtree Ltd has announced the dissolution and liquidation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, LTIMindtree Spain, S.L., as of March 31, 2026. This development is in accordance with Regulation 30 and Para A of Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The confirmation of the subsidiary's closure was received via an email communication on April 8, 2026, from a local consultant in Spain. Shareholders and other stakeholders are informed to take note of this update for their records.

  • LTIMindtree Spain, S.L. has been dissolved and liquidated as of March 31, 2026.
  • The closure is in compliance with SEBI Regulations, 2015, Regulation 30 and Para A of Part A of Schedule III.
  • The confirmation of the subsidiary's closure was received from a local consultant in Spain via email on April 8, 2026.
  • Stakeholders are advised to take note of this update for their records.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LTIMindtree Ltd | Category: Subsidiary Closure
